title: Fresh Juicy Poached Basil Stir-fry
description: A refreshing and vibrant brunch dish featuring poached basil with a touch of garlic for added flavor and texture.
instructions: Wash the basil leaves and chop them into small pieces.
In a saucepan, heat oil over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add chopped basil to the saucepan, reduce heat to low, and cover with a lid. Cook for about 1-2 minutes or until the leaves wilt slightly but are still bright green.
Gently stir in lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the poached basil mixture into a serving bowl.
